title: mentha balearica
intro: Mentha balearica, also known as Balearic mint or Corsican mint, is a perennial plant belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) native to the Balearic Islands and Corsica. It possesses anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Mentha balearica include its ability to relieve nausea, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of Mentha balearica can be found in teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
